# Niklas Peterson

Niklas Peterson is a product designer and creator from Sweden. He brings digital products to life with pixels and code and is currently shaping experiences as a Senior Product Designer at LottieFiles.

Canonical site: https://niklaspeterson.com
Contact: mail@niklaspeterson.com

## Selected Work

- Lummi Figma plugin: Designed the Lummi Figma plugin with a focus on usability, simplicity, ease of use, and consistency with the Lummi web experience. https://niklaspeterson.com/work/lummi-figma-plugin
- Lummi web: Designed and implemented the Lummi design system and contributed to filters, image detail view, upload flow, and broader product experience. https://niklaspeterson.com/work/lummi-web
- Musho: Led the design of the Musho website, including interactive elements, animations, brand identity, visual style, color palette, and typography. https://niklaspeterson.com/work/musho
- Musho Figma Plugin: Created components and views for the Figma plugin and designed a concept for a chat-based AI interface. https://niklaspeterson.com/work/musho-figma-plugin
- Buenoverse: Designed the UI for avatar selection with a focus on ease of use, flexibility, avatar customization, navigation, and interactive feedback. https://niklaspeterson.com/work/buenoverse
- Bueno Drops Figma Plugin: Led design for a Figma plugin that helps artists convert designs into digital art without coding. https://niklaspeterson.com/work/bueno-drops-figma-plugin

## Side Projects

- Hydrify: iOS app by Niklas Peterson. https://hydrify.app
- Titls: iOS app by Niklas Peterson. https://titls.app
- Timestamps: side project linked from the portfolio. https://timestamps.app
